howItWorks.intro: This resting metabolic rate calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Mifflin-St Jeor

faq.a: The calories your body burns at complete rest to maintain basic functions like breathing and circulation.

faq.q: How is RMR different from BMR?
faq.a: BMR is measured in stricter conditions. RMR is slightly higher and more practical to measure.

howWeCalculate.intro: This resting metabolic rate calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
